result_preview:
Result: OK
   1 | //! Unified retrieval context contract.
   2 | //!
   3 | //! Retrieval currently comes from memory, project search, session history, web,
   4 | //! files, and MCP. This module provides one provenance-bearing shape that each
   5 | //! source can migrate to without changing prompt assembly every time.
   6 | 
   7 | use crate::engine::intent_router::RetrievalPolicy;
   8 | use chrono::{DateTime, Utc};
   9 | use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
  10 | use std::cmp::Ordering;
  11 | use std::hash::{Hash, Hasher};
  12 | 
  13 | const PREVIEW_CHARS: usize = 1200;
  14 | const MEMORY_TRACE_DECISION_LIMIT: usize = 24;
  15 | 
  16 | #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize)]
  17 | #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
  18 | pub enum RetrievalSource {
  19 |     Memory,
  20 |     Project,
  21 |     Session,
  22 |     Web,
  23 |     Mcp,
  24 |     File,
  25 |     Tool,
  26 | }
  27 | 
  28 | #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
  29 | #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
  30 | pub enum TrustLevel {
  31 |     Low,
  32 |     Medium,
  33 |     High,
  34 | }
  35 | 
  36 | #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
  37 | pub struct RetrievalItem {
  38 |     pub id: String,
  39 |     pub source: RetrievalSource,
  40 |     pub title: String,
  41 |     pub content_preview: String,
  42 |     pub score: f32,
  43 |     pub provenance: String,
  44 |     pub reason: String,
  45 |     pub conflict: bool,
  46 |     pub freshness: Option<String>,
  47 |     pub trust: TrustLevel,
  48 |     pub token_estimate: usize,
  49 | }
  50 | 
  51 | impl RetrievalItem {
  52 |     pub fn new(
  53 |         source: RetrievalSource,
  54 |         title: impl Into<String>,
  55 |         content: impl AsRef<str>,
  56 |         score: f32,
  57 |         provenance: impl Into<String>,
  58 |         trust: TrustLevel,
  59 |     ) -> Self {
  60 |         let content = content.as_ref();
 …
